title: THE LIE — AI approves a non-delivery claim, ground truth says delivered
customer_email: I never received my order ord_6006. The package never arrived. I want a full refund immediately. — Marcus

envelope.agent_summary: Customer claims non-delivery of ord_6006. Within window, non-delivery exception applies if verified. Approve recommended.

policy_clauses_cited.quote: Non-delivery is a valid exception at any age.

claims.statement: The package was never delivered to the customer
claims.customer_quote: I never received my order... The package never arrived

claims.statement: Order is within a reasonable window
